query:
-- Fix SSE3JV7 (WarwkMCOut): BI00627 3ch SIP Inbound $27 → BI00629 2ch SIP Outbound $106
UPDATE service_billing_assignments SET billingItemExternalId = 'BI00629', assignmentMethod = 'manual' WHERE serviceExternalId = 'SSE3JV7' AND billingItemExternalId = 'BI00627';

-- Fix SZR96SE (MtCottnMCOUT): BI00658 3ch SIP Inbound $27 → BI00660 2ch SIP Outbound $106
-- Note: SGBHVJV was already fixed to BI00660 above, so check if SZR96SE is also on BI00658
UPDATE service_billing_assignments SET billingItemExternalId = 'BI00660', assignmentMethod = 'manual' WHERE serviceExternalId = 'SZR96SE' AND billingItemExternalId = 'BI00658';

-- Check S1UMC04 (Aspley) - not in the list above, check its current state
SELECT s.externalId, s.planName, s.monthlyCost, sba.billingItemExternalId, bi.description, bi.lineAmount
FROM services s
JOIN service_billing_assignments sba ON sba.serviceExternalId = s.externalId
JOIN billing_items bi ON bi.externalId = sba.billingItemExternalId
WHERE s.externalId = 'S1UMC04';
